Subject: Your request could not be processed
From: support@lookupbroker.com

Dear Customer,

We were unable to process your data deletion request because the
information provided does not match our records.

To proceed, please provide:
- Full legal name
- Date of birth
- Current mailing address

Without this information we cannot verify your identity and process
the deletion request.

Regards,
Support Team
LookUpBroker LLC
